programme.title: Timewarp TV! 1986 - EP1
programme.desc: 70 songs from a classic year of 80s pop - 1986!

programme.title: WOW! What A Party! - EP1
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Bruno's Rebels & Rule Breakers! - EP1
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes has stories galore from 20 of rock and pop's real game changers. Icons, rebels, activists & a few of the more unexpected heroes who reshaped music & the media.

programme.title: The Power Of Love! - EP1
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: 4 Hours of LOVE! 1980-1989 - EP1
programme.desc: From 'Please Don't Go' in 1980 to 'Don't Know Much' in 1989 - these are simply the 50 biggest love & break-up songs of the decade, in order.

programme.title: Barrioke Karaoke! 80s v 90s - EP1
programme.desc: He was Barry in Eastenders, Barry in Extras & now now he's Barri in Barrioke Karaoke! Shaun Williamson has 3 hours of party madness with a twist - it's 80s v 90s!

programme.title: 4 Hours of LOVE! 1980-1989 - EP1
programme.desc: From 'Please Don't Go' in 1980 to 'Don't Know Much' in 1989 - these are simply the 50 biggest love & break-up songs of the decade, in order.

programme.title: Lisa Stansfield's Ladies of 80s! - EP1
programme.desc: The UK's First Lady of soul selects her 20 favourite girls of the 80s. Expect Tracy Chapman, Grace Jones, Kate Bush & Whitney.

programme.title: The Power Of Love! - EP1
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: 20 Million Sellers of the 80s! - EP1
programme.desc: You know the songs, but do you know how many they sold? Leaving aside Xmas, these are the 20 million sellers of the decade. But only one sold over 2 million - can you guess?

programme.title: 70s Rock Anthems Night! - EP1
programme.desc: Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!

programme.title: 20 Truckin' Good Tunes! - EP1
programme.desc: Switch on your CB radio, grab a bar of that chunky chocolate, and climb abroad for ninety minutes of top tunes for all you '70s truckers out there. Can I get a big 10-4, buddy?!

programme.title: 70s Rock Anthems Night! - EP1
programme.desc: Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!

programme.title: Meat Loaf 1975-1995 - EP1
programme.desc: The much missed legend with 45 minutes of his monster rock operas from the 70s to the 90s.

programme.title: Mike Read's Pop Quiz: 1979 - EP1
programme.desc: Time to show off your nerdy knowledge as Mike Read quizzes you on the stars and songs of 1979!

programme.title: 1979 Unleashed! - EP1
programme.desc: Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!

programme.title: Top of the 70s Charts - EP1
programme.desc: 3 hours of bona fide classics from the best decade of music - every one of them made UK number 1. With rock, disco, soul, pop & more!

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1977 - EP1
programme.desc: If you thought 1977 was all about punk - you might want to think again! Simon Bates brings you a Silver Jubilee year full of pop, soul, disco, country, love & a little bit of rock!

programme.title: American No.1s of 1977 - EP1
programme.desc: In order - 14 videos that hit the top of the US chart in 1977. Some are obvious, but there are a few surprises along the way! Marilyn McCoo anyone?

programme.title: The Best 1977 Party...Ever! - EP1
programme.desc: Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up LOUD, with the greatest party anthems from '77 including Showaddywaddy, David Bowie, Boney M & The Sex Pistols.

programme.title: More Forgotten Feelgood Faves! - EP1
programme.desc: New to the NOW 70s archive - another 25 long forgotten pop classics. Including Boney M, Hall & Oates, Smokie & Dollar.

programme.title: Pat Sharp's Bad Hair - Big Tunes! - EP1
programme.desc: The hairvolution of rock'n'roll - the good, the bad, and the ugly. Pat Sharp is back with a countdown of classic 70s songs accompanied by dodgy 70s hair-don'ts!

programme.title: Bubblegum Pop! Top 30 - EP1
programme.desc: Today we'd call it Cheesy Pop! Back then it was Bubblegum Pop, and we loved it through the 70s - with David Cassidy, Mungo Jerry, Tony Orlando, Donny Osmond & Brotherhood of Man.

programme.title: Tony Blackburn's Pop Pin-Ups! - EP1
programme.desc: Tony's pulled out quite a list of pop pinups for 2 hours of indulgence. Bolan, Bowie, Cassidy, an Osmond, Abba girls, Rod, and ladies men Barry White and Demis Roussos. Phwoar!

programme.title: At The Copa! Top 25 - EP1
programme.desc: Music & passion were always the fashion! 25 exuberant and uplifting songs with latin beats, feelgood videos and some of the biggest uplifting moments in pop!

programme.title: Boogie Nights! - EP1
programme.desc: If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!

programme.title: Bubblegum Pop! Top 30 - EP1
programme.desc: Today we'd call it Cheesy Pop! Back then it was Bubblegum Pop, and we loved it through the 70s - with David Cassidy, Mungo Jerry, Tony Orlando, Donny Osmond & Brotherhood of Man.

programme.title: The Anthems! - EP1
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.desc: 99 anthems of rock from the decade that dominated the genre! With Aerosmith, Bon Jovi, Nirvana, Skunk Anansie, Meat Loaf & U2.

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 00s! - EP1
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight & Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?

programme.title: Feelgood Rock n Roll! 1990-1999 - EP1
programme.desc: From INXS & James at the start of the decade to U2 & Blondie at the end - these are 2 hours of feelgood rock n roll anthems from the 1990s.

programme.title: Alex Baker's Biggest 00s Anthems! - EP1
programme.desc: Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!

programme.title: No Intro Needed: The Top 50 - EP1
programme.desc: 50 tracks we know you know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first note, you'll be singing them all night long!

programme.title: The Anthems! - EP1
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Teenage Dirtbags! 1995-2010 - EP1
programme.desc: From the rebellious teens of the 90s and 00s we bring you the stars who said "To hell with the world" and expressed themselves through great tunes!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 25 Rock Rebels! - EP1
programme.desc: Rock & Roll started as a rebellion and Nicky Horne brings you the 25 people who pushed all the boundaries & refused to conform! These are greatest Rock Rebels of all time!

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Rock Icons - EP1
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!

programme.title: 80s v 90s Rock Legends! - EP1
programme.desc: 30 hit songs, 15 top rock legends - one track as they were in the 80s, and another in the 90s - simple!
